mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_reach WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_chemical_reach WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_reach WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_chemical_reach WHERE deleted = 0
AND (chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cas_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR registration_no LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_chemical_reach ( chemical_name, cas_number, registration_no, svhc, authorization_required, restriction_note, registration_date, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{chemicalName}, #{casNumber}, #{registrationNo}, #{svhc}, #{authorizationRequired}, #{restrictionNote}, #{registrationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_chemical_reach SET chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, registration_no = #{registrationNo}, svhc = #{svhc}, authorization_required = #{authorizationRequired}, restriction_note = #{restrictionNote}, registration_date = #{registrationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_chemical_reach SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
